Backend Engineer — Acme Corp

We are looking for a Backend Engineer to build reliable, scalable APIs and data services.

Responsibilities
- Build and maintain backend services and REST APIs
- Design data models and write efficient SQL queries
- Improve performance, reliability, and observability
- Collaborate with product and frontend teams

Requirements
- Strong Python experience
- Experience with Django or similar web frameworks
- Production experience with PostgreSQL
- Familiarity with REST, authentication, and API design
- Docker experience

Nice to have
- AWS experience
- Redis / background job processing
